fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Tennessee Speech-Language Pathologist License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a speech-language pathologist? Here's whether your license transfers to Tennessee - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: speech-language pathologist license reciprocity tennessee, how to transfer speech-language pathologist license to tennessee, speech-language pathologist compact tennessee, tennessee speech-language pathologist endorsement application

board.name: Board of Communication Disorders and Sciences

license_types.title: Licensed Speech-Language Pathologist
license_types.description: Full credential for independent SLP practice in Tennessee.

license_types.title: Provisional SLP License
license_types.description: For SLP graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.

steps.title: Register and Apply via LARAS
steps.description: Navigate to the TN Department of Health Licensure and Regulatory System (LARAS) portal, register for a new account, and then log in to complete and submit the online application for Speech-Language Pathologist licensure.

steps.title: Submit Supporting Documentation
steps.description: Upload official transcripts showing a master's or higher degree in Speech-Language Pathology from an accredited institution, and documentation of supervised clinical experience (e.g., ASHA Clinical Fellowship Report) through the LARAS portal.

steps.title: Pass National Examination
steps.description: Arrange for your official scores from the Praxis Examination in Speech-Language Pathology (Praxis 5331) to be sent directly to the Tennessee Board of Communication Disorders and Sciences.

steps.title: Complete Tennessee Jurisprudence Exam
steps.description: Take and pass the Tennessee Jurisprudence Examination for Speech-Language Pathologists and Audiologists, which can be accessed via CE Broker through a link provided on the Board's website.

steps.title: Undergo Criminal Background Check
steps.description: Complete a fingerprint-based criminal background check through IdentoGO, as instructed during the LARAS application process.

steps.title: Pay Application Fee
steps.description: Remit the required application fee of $175 as part of your submission within the LARAS portal.

telepractice_text: Tennessee permits telepractice for licensed SLPs and is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.
provisional_text: Tennessee issues a Provisional SLP License for graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.
reciprocity_text: Tennessee is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.

faqs.question: How much does a Tennessee SLP license cost?
Is Tennessee part of the ASLP Interstate Compact?
Does Tennessee allow telepractice for SLPs?
Does Tennessee have reciprocity for speech-language pathologists?
faqs.answer: Yes. Tennessee participates in the ASLP-IC. If your home state and license qualify for compact privilege, you can typically practice in Tennessee without a separate endorsement application.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my speech-language pathologist license to Tennessee?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 2 to 4 weeks. If you qualify for an active compact privilege, there may be no separate wait to start practicing.

faqs.question: Can I start working in Tennessee while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Tennessee is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.

hero.title: Become a Speech-Language Pathologist in Tennessee
hero.dek: To apply for an SLP license in Tennessee, you must submit your application through the TN Department of Health Licensure and Regulatory System (LARAS).

variants.label: New Applicant
variants.description: How to become licensed/certified for the first time

variants.label: Reciprocity

variants.label: Renewal
variants.description: How to renew your existing credential

official_links.portal_name: TN Department of Health Licensure and Regulatory System (LARAS)
official_links.registration_steps: Navigate to the LARAS portal and click 'New User' to register for an account. Once registered, log in and select the appropriate application type for Speech-Language Pathologist licensure.
